---
title: "Projekt_PAD_ostateczny"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)
library(caret)
library(e1071)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)

```

```{r}
heart_data <- read.csv("processed.cleveland.data", header = FALSE, na.strings = "?")
colnames(heart_data) <- c("age", "sex", "cp", "trestbps", "chol", "fbs", 
                          "restecg", "thalach", "exang", "oldpeak", 
                          "slope", "ca", "thal", "num")
heart_data <- na.omit(heart_data)

```

```{r}
heart_data <- heart_data %>%
  mutate(
    num = ifelse(as.numeric(as.character(num)) > 0, 1, 0),
    num = factor(num, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory")),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Kobieta", "MД™Ејczyzna")),
    cp = factor(cp, levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4), labels = c("Typowy", "Nietypowy", "Nie-sercowy", "Bezobjawowy")),
    fbs = factor(fbs, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("< 120", "> 120")),
    restecg = factor(restecg, levels = c(0, 1, 2), labels = c("Norma", "ST-T", "Hipertrofia")),
    exang = factor(exang, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Nie", "Tak")),
    slope = factor(slope, levels = c(1, 2, 3), labels = c("W gГіrД™", "PЕ‚asko", "W dГіЕ‚")),
    ca = factor(ca),
    thal = factor(thal, levels = c(3, 6, 7), labels = c("Norma", "Odwracalny", "TrwaЕ‚y"))
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(heart_data, aes(x = num, fill = num)) +
  geom_bar(color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4CAF50", "#F44336")) +
  labs(
    title = "Poprawny balans klas",
    subtitle = "ZЕ‚Д…czone stadia 1-4 w jednД… kategoriД™ 'Chory'",
    x = "Diagnoza", 
    y = "Liczba pacjentГіw"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
heart_data %>%
  select(age, trestbps, chol, thalach, oldpeak) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Zmienna", values_to = "WartoЕ›Д‡") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = WartoЕ›Д‡)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 25, fill = "skyblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_density(kernel = "gaussian", color = "darkblue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Zmienna, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Analiza rozkЕ‚adu zmiennych numerycznych",
    subtitle = "Zastosowano jД…drowy estymator gД™stoЕ›ci (JД…dro Radialne/Gaussa)",
    x = "WartoЕ›Д‡", 
    y = "GД™stoЕ›Д‡"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

```{r}
num_vars <- heart_data %>% select(age, trestbps, chol, thalach, oldpeak)
cor_matrix <- cor(num_vars, method = "spearman")

corrplot(cor_matrix, 
         method = "color", 
         type = "upper", 
         addCoef.col = "black", 
         tl.col = "black", 
         tl.srt = 45,
         title = "Korelacja Spearmana zmiennych numerycznych",
         mar = c(0,0,2,0)) 

```

```{r}
heart_data %>%
  select(num, age, trestbps, chol, thalach, oldpeak) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -num, names_to = "Zmienna", values_to = "WartoЕ›Д‡") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = num, y = WartoЕ›Д‡, fill = num)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.color = "red", outlier.shape = 16) +
  facet_wrap(~ Zmienna, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4CAF50", "#F44336")) +
  labs(
    title = "Zmienne numeryczne a diagnoza (Boxploty)",
    x = "Diagnoza",
    y = "WartoЕ›Д‡"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
heart_data %>%
  select(num, sex, exang, fbs, restecg) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -num, names_to = "Zmienna", values_to = "Kategoria") %>%
  drop_na(Kategoria) %>%
  mutate(Zmienna = recode(Zmienna, 
                          sex = "PЕ‚eД‡", 
                          exang = "DЕ‚awica wysiЕ‚kowa (exang)", 
                          fbs = "Cukier we krwi (fbs)", 
                          restecg = "Wynik EKG (restecg)")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Kategoria, fill = num)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", color = "black", alpha = 0.8) + 
  facet_wrap(~ Zmienna, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4CAF50", "#F44336"), name = "Diagnoza") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) + 
  labs(
    title = "Procentowe ryzyko choroby: Podstawowe wywiady",
    x = "OdpowiedЕє / Wynik",
    y = "Procentowy odsetek pacjentГіw"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
heart_data %>%
  select(num, cp, ca, thal, slope) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -num, names_to = "Zmienna", values_to = "Kategoria") %>%
  drop_na(Kategoria) %>%
  mutate(Zmienna = recode(Zmienna, 
                          cp = "Rodzaj bГіlu klatki (cp)", 
                          ca = "Liczba zabarwionych naczyЕ„ (ca)", 
                          thal = "Defekt w scyntygrafii (thal)", 
                          slope = "Nachylenie odcinka ST (slope)")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Kategoria, fill = num)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", color = "black", alpha = 0.8) + 
  facet_wrap(~ Zmienna, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4CAF50", "#F44336"), name = "Diagnoza") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) + 
  labs(
    title = "Procentowe ryzyko choroby: Badania specjalistyczne",
    x = "Kategoria diagnostyczna",
    y = "Procentowy odsetek pacjentГіw"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 15, hjust = 1, face = "bold"), 
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
set.seed(123) 
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(heart_data$num, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train_data <- heart_data[trainIndex, ]
test_data  <- heart_data[-trainIndex, ]
```

```{r}
num_cols <- c("age", "trestbps", "chol", "thalach", "oldpeak")

preProcValues <- preProcess(train_data[, num_cols], method = c("center", "scale"))

train_data_std <- train_data
test_data_std  <- test_data

train_data_std[, num_cols] <- predict(preProcValues, train_data[, num_cols])
test_data_std[, num_cols]  <- predict(preProcValues, test_data[, num_cols])
```

```{r}
model_nb <- naiveBayes(num ~ ., data = train_data_std)
model_log <- glm(num ~ ., data = train_data_std, family = binomial)
macierz_strat <- matrix(c(0, 1,
                          3, 0), byrow = TRUE, nrow = 2)

model_tree_big <- rpart(num ~ ., data = train_data_std, method = "class",
                        parms = list(loss = macierz_strat),
                        control = rpart.control(cp = 0.001))


najlepsze_cp <- model_tree_big$cptable[which.min(model_tree_big$cptable[,"xerror"]), "CP"]
model_tree <- prune(model_tree_big, cp = najlepsze_cp)
```

```{r}
prob_nb_train <- predict(model_nb, train_data_std, type = "raw")
pred_nb_train <- factor(ifelse(prob_nb_train[, "Chory"] > 0.25, "Chory", "Zdrowy"), levels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory"))

prob_log_train <- predict(model_log, train_data_std, type = "response")
pred_log_train <- factor(ifelse(prob_log_train > 0.25, "Chory", "Zdrowy"), levels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory"))

pred_tree_train <- predict(model_tree, train_data_std, type = "class")


cm_nb_train <- confusionMatrix(pred_nb_train, train_data_std$num, positive = "Chory")
cm_log_train <- confusionMatrix(pred_log_train, train_data_std$num, positive = "Chory")
cm_tree_train <- confusionMatrix(pred_tree_train, train_data_std$num, positive = "Chory")


wyniki_trening <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Naiwny Bayes", "Regresja Logistyczna", "Drzewo Decyzyjne"),
  CzuloЕ›Д‡ = c(cm_nb_train$byClass["Sensitivity"], cm_log_train$byClass["Sensitivity"], cm_tree_train$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
  SwoistoЕ›Д‡ = c(cm_nb_train$byClass["Specificity"], cm_log_train$byClass["Specificity"], cm_tree_train$byClass["Specificity"]),
  DokladnoЕ›Д‡ = c(cm_nb_train$overall["Accuracy"], cm_log_train$overall["Accuracy"], cm_tree_train$overall["Accuracy"])
)


wyniki_trening[,-1] <- round(wyniki_trening[,-1] * 100, 2)
print(wyniki_trening)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
folds <- createFolds(train_data_std$num, k = 10, list = TRUE, returnTrain = FALSE)


czul_nb <- czul_log <- czul_tree <- numeric(10)
swoi_nb <- swoi_log <- swoi_tree <- numeric(10)
dokl_nb <- dokl_log <- dokl_tree <- numeric(10)


for(i in 1:10) {
  val_idx <- folds[[i]]
  cv_train <- train_data_std[-val_idx, ]
  cv_val   <- train_data_std[val_idx, ]
  
  m_nb  <- naiveBayes(num ~ ., data = cv_train)
  m_log <- glm(num ~ ., data = cv_train, family = binomial)
  
  m_tree_big <- rpart(num ~ ., data = cv_train, method = "class", 
                      parms = list(loss = macierz_strat), 
                      control = rpart.control(cp = 0.001))
  m_tree <- prune(m_tree_big, cp = m_tree_big$cptable[which.min(m_tree_big$cptable[,"xerror"]), "CP"])
  
  p_nb  <- factor(ifelse(predict(m_nb, cv_val, type = "raw")[, "Chory"] > 0.25, "Chory", "Zdrowy"), levels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory"))
  p_log <- factor(ifelse(predict(m_log, cv_val, type = "response") > 0.25, "Chory", "Zdrowy"), levels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory"))
  p_tree <- predict(m_tree, cv_val, type = "class")
  
  cm_nb   <- confusionMatrix(p_nb, cv_val$num, positive = "Chory")
  cm_log  <- confusionMatrix(p_log, cv_val$num, positive = "Chory")
  cm_tree <- confusionMatrix(p_tree, cv_val$num, positive = "Chory")
  
  czul_nb[i] <- cm_nb$byClass["Sensitivity"]; swoi_nb[i] <- cm_nb$byClass["Specificity"]; dokl_nb[i] <- cm_nb$overall["Accuracy"]
  czul_log[i] <- cm_log$byClass["Sensitivity"]; swoi_log[i] <- cm_log$byClass["Specificity"]; dokl_log[i] <- cm_log$overall["Accuracy"]
  czul_tree[i] <- cm_tree$byClass["Sensitivity"]; swoi_tree[i] <- cm_tree$byClass["Specificity"]; dokl_tree[i] <- cm_tree$overall["Accuracy"]
}


wyniki_cv <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Naiwny Bayes", "Regresja Logistyczna", "Drzewo Decyzyjne"),
  CzuloЕ›Д‡_CV = c(mean(czul_nb), mean(czul_log), mean(czul_tree)),
  SwoistoЕ›Д‡_CV = c(mean(swoi_nb), mean(swoi_log), mean(swoi_tree)),
  DokladnoЕ›Д‡_CV = c(mean(dokl_nb), mean(dokl_log), mean(dokl_tree))
)

wyniki_cv[,-1] <- round(wyniki_cv[,-1] * 100, 2)
print(wyniki_cv)
```

```{r}
prob_nb_test <- predict(model_nb, test_data_std, type = "raw")
pred_nb_test <- factor(ifelse(prob_nb_test[, "Chory"] > 0.25, "Chory", "Zdrowy"), levels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory"))

prob_log_test <- predict(model_log, test_data_std, type = "response")
pred_log_test <- factor(ifelse(prob_log_test > 0.25, "Chory", "Zdrowy"), levels = c("Zdrowy", "Chory"))

pred_tree_test <- predict(model_tree, test_data_std, type = "class")


cm_nb <- confusionMatrix(pred_nb_test, test_data_std$num, positive = "Chory")
cm_log <- confusionMatrix(pred_log_test, test_data_std$num, positive = "Chory")
cm_tree <- confusionMatrix(pred_tree_test, test_data_std$num, positive = "Chory")

wyniki_modeli <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Naiwny Bayes", "Regresja Logistyczna", "Drzewo Decyzyjne"),
  CzuloЕ›Д‡ = c(cm_nb$byClass["Sensitivity"], cm_log$byClass["Sensitivity"], cm_tree$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
  SwoistoЕ›Д‡ = c(cm_nb$byClass["Specificity"], cm_log$byClass["Specificity"], cm_tree$byClass["Specificity"]),
  DokladnoЕ›Д‡ = c(cm_nb$overall["Accuracy"], cm_log$overall["Accuracy"], cm_tree$overall["Accuracy"])
)


wyniki_modeli[,-1] <- round(wyniki_modeli[,-1] * 100, 2)
print(wyniki_modeli)


indeks_zwyciezcy <- which.max(wyniki_modeli$CzuloЕ›Д‡)
najlepszy_model <- wyniki_modeli$Model[indeks_zwyciezcy]
najlepsza_czulosc <- wyniki_modeli$CzuloЕ›Д‡[indeks_zwyciezcy]


cat("Najlepszy model do wdroЕјenia medycznego to :", najlepszy_model, "<<<\n")
cat("OsiД…gnД…Е‚ najwyЕјszД… czuЕ‚oЕ›Д‡ na poziomie     :", najlepsza_czulosc, "%\n")
```

```{r}
summary(model_log)
```

```{r}
rpart.plot(model_tree, 
           type = 3, 
           extra = 106, 
           fallen.leaves = TRUE, 
           main = "Struktura zoptymalizowanego Drzewa Decyzyjnego",
           box.palette = c("#4CAF50", "#F44336"), 
           shadow.col = "gray")
```

```{r}
print(model_nb)
```
